# Skill: create-bedrock-block

## When to use
Use this skill when working on the **create-bedrock-block** workflow in the generated Bedrock product repository.

## Inputs
- Target add-on objective
- Existing pack files (if any)
- Validation output (if any)

## Procedure
1. Confirm version policy and pack structure requirements.
2. Apply the workflow for this skill with deterministic edits.
3. Run validation and capture actionable follow-up items.

## Outputs
- Updated or newly generated files.
- Short verification steps and validation summary.
